title: MemberRow — Band Member List Row with Role Management
problem: Band Settings lists all members with their roles. The Recorder needs to change roles and remove members from within the same row — without navigating to a separate member-management screen.
analysis:
MemberRow renders one member: avatar (initials, colored circle), display name, email (text-secondary), role chip (Badge).

Role chip behavior:
- **Recorder**: chip is a `<button>` → taps to open a BottomSheet picker with Recorder/Editor/Member options (current highlighted in amber). Saves via PATCH.
- **Members/Editors**: chip is a static Badge — no tap response.
- **Self-role chip**: always disabled (tooltip 'Can't change your own role'), regardless of role.

Delete (Recorder only): iOS swipe-left → 'Remove' danger button. Android/desktop: long-press → context menu. Both → BottomSheet confirmation: 'Remove [Name]? They'll lose access immediately.' Cancel / Remove (danger).
successCriteria:
- Avatar initials + name + email rendered per row
- Role chip: interactive for Recorder (not self), static for all others
- Tap role chip → BottomSheet with 3 role options, current highlighted
- Select role → PATCH to Postgres, chip updates optimistically
- Self-role chip: disabled, tooltip text
- Delete: swipe-left (iOS) or long-press (Android/desktop) → confirm sheet → DELETE membership
- After delete: member row removed from list immediately
implementation: components/bands/MemberRow.tsx: props { member, isSelf, canManage (=isRecorder), onRoleChange, onRemove }. Role chip: Button (canManage && !isSelf) or Badge (others). Delete: touch event handling for swipe/long-press. Both delete paths call onRemove(memberId) after confirmation.

decisions.rationale: A Recorder downgrading themselves to Member with no other Recorder would leave the band with no one able to create sessions or freeze clips. Blocking self-role change prevents accidental lockout.
decisions.recommendation: isSelf prop disables role chip regardless of canManage. UI: disabled badge with tooltip.

knownLimitations: Role change is immediate with no undo — if Recorder accidentally changes another member's role, they must manually change it back
Drive access (if any) is not revoked when a member is removed — audio files on Drive are unaffected
userGuide: In Band Settings, each member row shows their role. As the band creator (Recorder), you can tap a member's role chip to change it or swipe to remove them from the band.
